behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files (schema.ts, service.ts, repo.ts, account.sql.ts, AGENTS.md), the required branded types (RefreshToken, DeviceCode, UserCode), Schema.Class count (5+), Schema.Duration, Layer.effect/Effect.gen/AccountRepo.of/namespace AccountRepo, and the Effect guide with Schema/Service/Error sections including Schema.brand.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken and what patterns to use, but doesn't provide exact code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for pattern presence (Layer.effect, AccountRepo.of, Schema.Class count >= 5, branded type exports) which allow alternative correct implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute bun scripts to instantiate branded types and run unit tests/typecheck subprocesses, not only text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual type exports, working typecheck, and passing unit tests for account/repo and account/service — a stub cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Branded types, Schema.Class, Duration, Layer.effect pattern, and AGENTS.md Effect guide are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under commented sections (fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass) with descriptive docstrings.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names module-level files but does not point to exact buggy lines; localization within files is still the agent's work.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: AGENTS.md gold diff appends a new section; it's localized and doesn't rewrite existing content.
